title: Total Lipid Extraction from Baker's Yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae)
author: Israel Olayide
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4h8qt9w

steps.title: Sterilize the inoculating loop by dipping...
steps.instruction: Sterilize the inoculating loop by dipping it in the ethanol and heating it for 30 second in the flame

steps.title: Allow loop to cool the loop...
steps.instruction: Allow loop to cool the loop at least for 10 seconds

steps.title: Inoculate 5 mL YPD with yeast colony from plate
steps.instruction: Inoculate 5 mL YPD with yeast colony from plate

steps.title: Grow overnight at 30°C with shaking at 250 rpm
steps.instruction: Grow overnight at 30°C with shaking at 250 rpm

steps.title: Vortex vigorously for 5 mins, and...
steps.instruction: Vortex vigorously for 5 mins, and centrifuge at 150 x g for 5 mins at room temperature.

steps.title: After centrifugation, a two-phase system is obtained
steps.instruction: After centrifugation, a two-phase system is obtained: aqueous top phase and organic bottom phase which contains the lipids.

steps.title: Carefully remove the top aqueous layer...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the top aqueous layer and the middle insoluble layers (precipitated proteins).

steps.title: The organic bottom layer is dried...
steps.instruction: The organic bottom layer is dried using a speed vacuum or dried under a steady stream of nitrogen.

steps.title: Record the weight of the dried...
steps.instruction: Record the weight of the dried sample by pre-weighing an Eppendorf tube or equivalent before or after drying the lipid.

steps.title: Incubate plate at 30°C until colonies...
steps.instruction: Incubate plate at 30°C until colonies 1-2 mm in diameter have formed (2-3 days)

steps.title: Allow plate to incubate for 2-3...
steps.instruction: Allow plate to incubate for 2-3 days at 25-30 °C until colonies are 1-2mm in diameter

steps.title: Harvest the whole cells when OD 600 is 1
steps.instruction: Harvest the whole cells when OD 600 is 1.5 Centrifuge at 1000 x g for 2 minutes or until clear to pellet the yeast

steps.title: Pour off the supernatant without disturbing cell pellet
steps.instruction: Pour off the supernatant without disturbing cell pellet

steps.title: Wash the cells three times by...
steps.instruction: Wash the cells three times by resuspending pellets in 1ml PBS, centrifuge for at 500 x g for 3-5 mins.

steps.title: After washing three times with PBS,...
steps.instruction: After washing three times with PBS, resuspend in 1ml PBS and transfer this mixture to a 15 ml conical centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 3
steps.instruction: Add 3.75 mL of chloroform/methanol (1:2) to the 1 mL of resuspended cells Add 1.25 mL chloroform and 1.25 mL sterile water subsequently.

steps.title: Streak plate from prepared glycerol stock...
steps.instruction: Streak plate from prepared glycerol stock (-80 °C) and spread on YPD agar plate
